title: brassia angustilabia
intro: Brassia angustilabia, also known as the 'Tiger Orchid', is a species of orchid that is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever and relieving respiratory issues, due to its expectorant and antispasmodic properties. Brassia angustilabia is often prepared as a tea or tincture, and can also be used in herbal remedies for its medicinal properties.
